product.name: Arox T2 WR/Antibac
product.specLine: 160 g/m², 97% Polyester 3% Silver, Inherent Antibacterial, Water and Oil Repellent 2/1 S Twill Fabric
descriptions: 97% polyester 3% silver, inherent antibacterial medical wear twill fabric with silver yarn integrated. Arox T2 WR/Antibac fabrics are mostly used for medical applications with superior antibacterial functions.
It elliminates all odor and bacteria formation on the body.
Arox T2 WR/Antibac is tested for AATCC 147, AATCC 100, ASTM E 2149 , certified for EN 13795.
160 g/m², 97% Polyester 3% Silver, Inherent Antibacterial, Water and Oil Repellent 2/1 S Twill Fabric
technicalParameters: Tensile Strength | Warp > 900N ; Weft > 700N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp > 25N ; Weft > 20N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1
Water and Oil Repellent | 4 | EN ISO 4920
applicationImageLabels: EN 149 FFP2, EN 18184 Antiviral, Silver Pro Mask from www.haltermedikal.com
EN 14683, EN 18184 Antiviral, Silver Pro Mask from www.haltermedikal.com
functionIconLabels: >> Arox T2 WR Antibac Data Sheet

evidence: Arox T2 WR/Antibac fabrics are mostly used for medical applications with superior antibacterial functions.
acceptedMatches.rationale: Product data explicitly states medical uniform application, cleanroom suit certification (EN 13795) and medical mask norm EN 14683, directly supporting medical use.

evidence: Arox T2 WR/Antibac fabrics are mostly used for medical applications with superior antibacterial functions.
EN 149 FFP2, EN 18184 Antiviral, Silver Pro Mask
primary.rationale: Product explicitly states medical uniform application, cleanroom suit certification and mask-related norms (EN 14683), directly supporting medical use as the dominant and central end use.

secondary.rationale: No independently supported secondary application is stated; antibacterial/antiviral and water-oil repellent properties are shared traits supporting the medical use rather than a separate sector.

alternativesConsidered.reasonNotSelected: No general industrial workwear use stated; the product is explicitly framed for medical uniforms and cleanroom suits.
No print, signage, or advertising use indicated.
